docs.title: 🇯🇵 My Japanese Notes
docs.text: A personal Japanese learning workspace with two systems:

docs.title: 📓 Vocabulary Notes
docs.text:
Personal notes generated by my Telegram bot. Send Japanese text, the bot analyzes it and saves a structured note.

Each note includes: - 分詞解析 (word breakdown) - 意思 (meaning) - 例句 (example sentence) - 出典 (source) - 参考 (references)

docs.title: 📐 Grammar Reference
docs.text:
Static reference pages covering N5–N1 grammar patterns (636 pages), generated from JLPT grammar JSON data.

Browse by level: N5 · N4 · N3 · N2 · N1
